title: Luminarc Stacking Bowl Clear
features: Made in France, Easy to clean
Recyclable, Eco-Friendly, Extra Resistant Tempered Glass, Extra Strong , 100% Healthy Material, 100% Hygienic , Extra Resistant , Cadmium and Lead Free, Non-Porous , Long Lasting
Microwave Safe, Refrigerator Friendly, Thermal Shock Resistant
description: Set of six Luminarch glass fruit washers. The feature that makes them perfect for everyday use as small appetizer bowls, for sauces or desserts is their perfect stackability, great strength and suitability for daily use in microwave or dishwasher.
